title: Nine-point per-regime topological/vortex/defect observables from D1 lattice runs (bundled aggregates for Phase O reproducibility on systems without parent-corpus access)
scope: Per-regime mean values (averaged over n_seeds D1 runs, n_seeds in {24, 28, 32}) of the topological-defect side observables that correlate with the diagonal-block emergent source tensor. Provides the input data for the Phase-O vortex-background decomposition test.

data_provenance_notes.vortex_count_authoritative: vortex_count is the corpus-canonical per-seed count of active winding triangles (sum of all triangles with |winding| >= 0.25). Read from D1 NPZ field 'vortex_count' (n_seeds,) per regime; aggregated to per-regime mean. THIS is the authoritative vortex count.
data_provenance_notes.winding_map_truncation_caveat: winding_map in the D1 NPZ has shape (n_seeds, N_lattice) but is the per-seed list of triangle windings PADDED with NaN to N_lattice OR TRUNCATED to N_lattice (whichever applies). For all regimes with n_triangles > N_lattice (P5..P8), the truncation discards the majority of vortex triangles. The bundled winding_map_truncated_density_values reproduces what a naive count from the truncated array gives; it is an UNDERESTIMATE of the true vortex density and should not be used as the primary regressor.
data_provenance_notes.per_triangle_fraction_invariance: The vortex_count / C(N,3) ratio is approximately constant ~0.25 across all 9 regimes (range 0.246-0.256). This indicates the lattice is in a constant-density vortex-condensate phase, with vortex content scaling extensively with the total triangle count C(N,3) ~ N^3/6. The intensive per-triangle fraction is NOT a useful regressor; the extensive per-node density (vortex_count / N) is the proper variable for the linear T_munu decomposition.

winding_quantization_check.histogram_distribution: Triangle windings are integer-quantized at {-1, 0, +1} on the lattice; the corpus's triangle_winding() implementation in src/worldformula/defects/vortices.py:28 computes discrete winding from per-edge phase increments, automatically quantized to integer multiples of 2*pi/(2*pi) = 1 by topology. The geometric reading: each active triangle either has no net winding, or carries +/-1 unit of U(1) topological charge -- direct evidence for actual U(1) topological vortex defects on the relational lattice.

computation.winding_abs_mean: mean of |winding_map| per seed, averaged over seeds; winding_map ~ (n_seeds, N_lattice) topological-charge map per node
computation.defect_density: mean of defect_density_ts (defect-density time-series) per seed, averaged over seeds and time samples
computation.kzm_family_density_total: mean of b3_kzm_density_family.sum(axis=1) per seed (Kibble-Zurek family-resolved density, total over 5 classes)
computation.kzm_family_density_5class: mean of b3_kzm_density_family[:, j] for j=0..4 per regime; the 5 classes are scaled versions with fixed ratios across regimes ~ (1.00, 1.23, 1.41, 1.73, 2.00) approximately equal sqrt(1, 1.5, 2, 3, 4) -- they are 5 graduated quench-rate levels, NOT 5 independent fermion-generation labels
computation.topological_charge_drift: mean of noise_topological_charge_drift_seed per regime; measure of how the topological charge drifts under per-step noise
computation.compaction_score: mean of e1b_compaction_score per regime; compactness of the relational graph (very stable across regimes ~ 0.216)
computation.topological_score: mean of e1c_topological_score per regime; consistency of the topological structure (declines from ~0.85 at P1 to ~0.34 at P8)

key_correlations_with_diagonal_T_munu.comment: Per-regime values of (T_00, T_ii) read from data/lattice_diagonal_T_munu_9point.json; correlations computed by src/verify_lambda_vortex_background_decomposition.py

five_kzm_class_ratios.interpretation: Ratios approximately equal to sqrt(1, 1.5, 2, 3, 4); the 5 KZM classes are graduated quench-rate or threshold-density levels of one underlying KZM-defect statistic, NOT 5 independent generations. All 5 family columns correlate identically with T_00, T_ii, w_eff (r=-0.789, +0.804, +0.819).

reviewer_hedging.scope: Per-regime mean aggregates only; per-seed dispersion not separately bundled.
reviewer_hedging.kzm_5class_caveat: The 5 KZM-density columns are NOT 5 independent fermion families; they are scaled versions of one underlying density. The 'family' label in b3_kzm_density_family refers to graduated quench-rate levels.
reviewer_hedging.P6_P8_provenance: P6, P7, P8 NPZ files come from d1_lattice_payload/ (P0..P5 from d1_lattice_payload/); the bundled per-regime means are extracted from these immutable inputs.
reviewer_hedging.n_seeds_variation: n_seeds varies across regimes (24, 28, 32); seed-resampling uncertainty bands are NOT propagated in the bundled means.
